pages.title: Naming Conventions
pages.text: Follow these rules:$(br2)$(li)Use only lowercase letters, numbers, underscores$(li)Be descriptive but concise$(li)File names become part of the rule ID$(br2)Good: $(o)nether_fortress.json, deep_dark_high_level.json$()$(br2)Bad: $(o)Rule1.json, my cool rule.json, UPPERCASE.json$()

pages.title: Rule IDs
pages.text: Rule IDs are automatically generated from the file path:$(br2)$omypack:structures/stronghold.json$()$(br2)This ID appears in debug logs and can be referenced elsewhere.$(br2)Keep IDs meaningful-they help with troubleshooting.

pages.title: Multiple Datapacks
pages.text: Multiple datapacks can provide rules:$(br2)$(li)All are loaded together$(li)Same-priority rules may conflict$(li)Higher priority wins within same tier$(br2)Use the $(o)priority$() field to control precedence across packs.
